evidence: Created docs/ideology-expansion-backlog.md with 60 curated rows satisfying approved row contract; verification artifact /tmp/ideology-backlog-verification.json passed; final architect review and executor QA passed with no blockers.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

architectReview.evidence: Final read-only review (subagent:15-BacklogFinalReview and normalized status subagent:17-BacklogStatusNormalize) found the backlog is explicitly non-implementation, defers centroids/label ids/TypeScript data edits/scoring/UI/question/validation work, preserves source provenance, satisfies row contract, and has zero blockers. AI slop cleanup blocking count: 0.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA/red-team (subagent:16-BacklogFinalQa) parsed the markdown artifact and verified 60 rows, six non-empty required fields per row, only P1/P2/P3 priorities, no current labels as New-label candidates, no duplicate normalized row names, source provenance and Philosophyball caveat present, and no centroid/code/TODO/test-change leakage.
e2eCommands: eval Python verification over docs/ideology-expansion-backlog.md and src/data/labels.ts

artifactRefs.description: argv-only CLI replay JSON for a safe node replay receipt
row-count, field-shape, priority, duplicate/current-label, provenance, and implementation-leak adversarial checks
structured verification receipt for the markdown backlog artifact

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved plan acceptance criterion: Backlog artifact contains 30-60 included rows
contractCoverage.obligation: Artifact must contain at least 30 and at most 60 curated backlog rows.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved plan acceptance criterion: Every row has all required fields
contractCoverage.obligation: Each row must include name, source, parent/new-label status, alias/subtype grouping, inclusion rationale, and priority.
Rows must use only P1, P2, and P3 priorities consistent with the plan semantics.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved plan acceptance criterion: Existing labels are not repeated as net-new additions
contractCoverage.obligation: Current labels from src/data/labels.ts may be anchors/comparisons but must not appear as New-label candidate rows.
Artifact must not include numeric centroids, code snippets, TypeScript data edits, test changes, or implementation TODO leakage.
No GUI/browser behavior is changed by this docs-only story.
contractCoverage.reason: The approved story delivers a markdown backlog artifact only; no user-facing app surface was modified.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: Read and parse docs/ideology-expansion-backlog.md with Python checks recorded in /tmp/ideology-backlog-verification.json

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: src/data/labels.ts current labels used as anchor reference
surfaceEvidence.invocation: Extract current label names from src/data/labels.ts and compare against New-label candidate row names

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: No implementation leakage in docs-only backlog
surfaceEvidence.invocation: Scan backlog markdown for numeric centroid arrays/assignments, code fences, TypeScript exports, label id assignments, question mappings, and TODO-like markers

surfaceEvidence.reason: No GUI/browser change shipped; the target surface is a static markdown/package artifact.
No CLI command or behavior changed; parser verification is internal QA for a markdown artifact.

adversarialCases.scenario: Artifact exceeds upper bound or under-delivers rows.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Row count remains within inclusive 30-60 range.

adversarialCases.scenario: A markdown pipe row has missing or shifted cells.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Every parsed row has exactly six non-empty required fields.

adversarialCases.scenario: Rows use invalid priorities or priorities inconsistent with status.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Only P1/P2/P3 are used; P1 rows are new-label candidates, P2 rows are grouped aliases/subtypes, and P3 rows are speculative.

adversarialCases.contractRef: Existing labels not repeated as net-new additions
adversarialCases.scenario: A current src/data/labels.ts label appears as a New-label candidate.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Current labels are only anchors/comparisons, never net-new candidate rows.

adversarialCases.scenario: Backlog includes numeric centroids, code snippets, implementation TODOs, test claims, or source edits.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Artifact remains docs-only and explicitly defers implementation work.

adversarialCases.scenario: Rows overclaim independent Philosophyball verification or drop source provenance.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Rows preserve source provenance and document the Philosophyball retrieval caveat.

iteration.evidence: Initial advisory cleanup findings were fixed, parser verification was rerun cleanly, and final architect review plus executor QA/red-team passed with no blockers.
rerunCommands: eval Python verification over docs/ideology-expansion-backlog.md and src/data/labels.ts
